title: American Pimp
overview: Street pimps, all of them African-American, discuss their lives and work: getting started, being flamboyant, pimping in various U.S. cities, bringing a woman into their group, taking a woman from another pimp, and the rules and regulations of pimping. The men are clear: it's about money.

trailers.title: Albert Hughes: "American Pimp" was the Lowest Point in Our Careers (Part 16)
